config.disclaimer_text:
Soccery TV does not host or upload any video content. All football streams available in the app are provided by third-party sources publicly available on the internet.

We do not control or guarantee the availability, quality, or legality of any streams. All trademarks, logos, and content belong to their respective owners.

If you are a rights holder and believe any content violates your rights, please contact us for prompt removal.
config.privacy_text:
Soccery TV respects your privacy. We do not collect personal information such as your name, email, or phone number.

The app may collect limited anonymous data (such as app usage and crash reports) to improve performance and user experience.

We may send notifications for match updates, news, or important announcements. You can disable notifications anytime from your device settings.

Soccery TV does not host any video content. All streams are provided by third-party sources, and all content belongs to their respective owners.

If you have any questions or concerns, please contact us.
config.notice_text:
Never miss a match! Get live updates, match alerts, and exclusive sports content on our Telegram channel.

Telegram Link: https://t.me/soccerytv
